'''Tanda Pryl''' was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Thunderflare]]'', which was part of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Villis Andal]]'s [[Elrood Sector Fleet|fleet]] in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. She had a great rivalry with [[Akal Zed]], captain of the ''[[Stalker/Legends|Stalker]]''.

==Biography==
Tanda came from a privileged family which taught her the subtle art of manipulating and influencing people. Her father's influence ensured that she was accepted into the Naval academy, although it was her abilities that enabled her rapid rise through the ranks.<ref name="PoG3" />

Captain Pryl's Star Destroyer was reasigned to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]] for the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Pryl survived the battle but refused to obey the new fleet commander, [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], after the battle. She decided to return in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] with her [[Starship/Legends|ship]].<ref name="TEGTW" />

==Personality and traits==
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Tanda Pryl was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] with [[Color/Legends|blonde]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] that she wore in a large braid down her back and had brilliant cobalt blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].
Tanda was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] in addition to her other gifts and believed that they were often found on backwater [[Planet/Legends|worlds]].<ref name="PoG3" />
